name: CROSS_TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_ORIGIN_YEAR_RANGE
description: Top assignees in an origin for a year range.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name:$origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= $start_year AND y.year <= $end_year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10;
